## Source plugin: `rawcopy`

Populates a partition by copying a raw image file directly. The source file is specified via `--sourceparams`.

- `--sourceparams="file=<image>.ext4"`: Copy the named image file into the partition.

Common usage:

```
part / --source rawcopy --sourceparams="file=core-image-minimal.ext4" --ondisk sda
```
